test_report.test_summary: Successful validation of an AI-driven SOW generation workflow across three tiers of complexity, ranging from basic feature extraction to complex business logic and scalability constraints.

test_cases.name: Standard Requirements
test_cases.focus: Element extraction (7 key inputs) and basic workflow.
test_cases.key_findings: Successfully identified all UI components including calculated fields and tables.

test_cases.name: Advanced Business Logic
test_cases.focus: Conditional logic, threshold-based routing ($10k), and audit trails.
test_cases.key_findings: Correctly identified CFO as a conditional stakeholder and upgraded formula logic to 'Grand Totals'.

test_cases.name: The Final Boss (Conflicts & Scalability)
test_cases.focus: Mobile responsiveness, 5,000 concurrent users, and budget validation.
test_cases.key_findings: Resolved platform conflicts by proposing a responsive web solution and captured non-functional scalability requirements.

future_roadmap_suggestions: Dynamic timeline calculation based on feature complexity.
Strict numerical constraint extraction (e.g., explicitly quoting $10,000).
